name: cyber-joss
description: 赛博烧纸 - CyberJoss: A digital burning ceremony web application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
